title: ExtraWarp
description: Mod adds points of movement around the worlds.
body: [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a071a84cf75714bde606769f94930a500df439c.png)](https://bisquit.host/en) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f99a56a1b2e550c994544fc435834c3ad68a9b4e_0.webp) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bda615505b2834a2d5ff36bc63003ccc3ffd0e0f.png) * Great functionality. * Adjustment of the number of warps based on rights. * Maximum convenience. * Event system for developers. * Full mod customization. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f589dafb5ef07c94e9da6b44b630d088c6bc86f7.png) * Create warp points to create different points of interest or allow players to teleport to create different communities. * Great functionality such as top warps, private warps, and the ability to invite to them. * Many ways to prevent griefing with warps. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce72d8d224a63328ec189fcba5feb6e399f07516.png) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/extralib)
